attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: calculate modulo 256 via x86 assembly
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
    lib: true
    scope: instruction
    mbc:
      - Data::Modulo [C0058]
    examples:
      - 9324D1A8AE37A36AE560C37448C9705A:0x4049A9
  features:
    #  and ecx, 800000FFh
    #  and ecx, 0FFh
    - and:
      - mnemonic: and
      - or:
        - number: 0x800000FF
        - number: 0xFF
signature_matches.name: calculate modulo 256 via x86 assembly

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: allocate memory
    authors:
      - 0x534a@mailbox.org
    lib: true
    scope: basic block
    mbc:
      - Memory::Allocate Memory [C0007]
    examples:
      - Practical Malware Analysis Lab 03-03.exe_:0x4010EA
      # ntdll
      - 563653399B82CD443F120ECEFF836EA3678D4CF11D9B351BB737573C2D856299:0x140001ABA
  features:
    - or:
      - api: kernel32.VirtualAlloc
      - api: kernel32.VirtualAllocEx
      - api: kernel32.VirtualAllocExNuma
      - api: kernel32.VirtualProtect
      - api: kernel32.VirtualProtectEx
      - api: NtAllocateVirtualMemory
      - api: ZwAllocateVirtualMemory
      - api: NtMapViewOfSection
      - api: ZwMapViewOfSection
signature_matches.name: allocate memory

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: allocate RWX memory
    namespace: host-interaction/process/inject
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
    scope: basic block
    mbc:
      - Memory::Allocate Memory [C0007]
    examples:
      - Practical Malware Analysis Lab 03-03.exe_:0x4010EA
      # ntdll
      - 563653399B82CD443F120ECEFF836EA3678D4CF11D9B351BB737573C2D856299:0x140001ABA
  features:
    - and:
      - match: allocate memory
      - number: 0x40 = PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE
signature_matches.name: allocate RWX memory
signature_matches.description: host-interaction/process/inject

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: create or open file
    authors:
      - michael.hunhoff@mandiant.com
      - joakim@intezer.com
    lib: true
    scope: basic block
    mbc:
      - File System::Create File [C0016]
    examples:
      - B5F85C26D7AA5A1FB4AF5821B6B5AB9B:0x401D7E
  features:
    - or:
      - api: CreateFile
      - api: CreateFileEx
      - api: IoCreateFile
      - api: IoCreateFileEx
      - api: ZwOpenFile
      - api: ZwCreateFile
      - api: NtOpenFile
      - api: NtCreateFile
      - api: fopen
      - api: fopen64
      - api: fdopen
      - api: freopen
      - api: open
      - api: openat
signature_matches.name: create or open file

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: contain loop
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
    lib: true
    scope: function
    examples:
      - 08AC667C65D36D6542917655571E61C8:0x406EAA
  features:
    - or:
      - characteristic: loop
      - characteristic: tight loop
      - characteristic: recursive call
signature_matches.name: contain loop

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: access the Windows event log
    namespace: host-interaction/log/winevt/access
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
    scope: function
    mbc:
      - Discovery::File and Directory Discovery::Log File [E1083.m01]
    examples:
      - mimikatz.exe_:0x45228B
  features:
    - or:
      - api: OpenEventLog
      - api: ClearEventLog
      - api: OpenBackupEventLog
      - api: ReportEvent
signature_matches.name: access the Windows event log
signature_matches.description: host-interaction/log/winevt/access

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: terminate process
    namespace: host-interaction/process/terminate
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
      - michael.hunhoff@mandiant.com
      - anushka.virgaonkar@mandiant.com
    scope: function
    mbc:
      - Process::Terminate Process [C0018]
    examples:
      - C91887D861D9BD4A5872249B641BC9F9:0x401A77
      - 9B7CCAA2AE6A5B96E3110EBCBC4311F6:0x10010307
  features:
    - or:
      - api: System.Diagnostics.Process::Kill
      - api: System.Diagnostics.Process::WaitForExit
      - api: System.Diagnostics.Process::WaitForExitAsync
      - api: System.Environment::Exit
      - api: System.Windows.Forms.Application::Exit
      - and:
        - optional:
          - match: open process
        - or:
          - api: kernel32.TerminateProcess
          - api: ntdll.NtTerminateProcess
          - api: kernel32.ExitProcess
signature_matches.name: terminate process
signature_matches.description: host-interaction/process/terminate

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: allocate thread local storage
    namespace: host-interaction/process
    authors:
      - michael.hunhoff@mandiant.com
    scope: function
    mbc:
      - Process::Allocate Thread Local Storage [C0040]
    examples:
      - 03B236B23B1EC37C663527C1F53AF3FE:0x18000ADF6
  features:
    - or:
      - api: kernel32.TlsAlloc
signature_matches.name: allocate thread local storage
signature_matches.description: host-interaction/process

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: link function at runtime on Windows
    namespace: linking/runtime-linking
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
      - michael.hunhoff@mandiant.com
    scope: function
    att&ck:
      - Execution::Shared Modules [T1129]
    examples:
      - 9324D1A8AE37A36AE560C37448C9705A:0x404130
      - Practical Malware Analysis Lab 01-04.exe_:0x401350
  features:
    - and:
      - os: windows
      - or:
        - api: kernel32.GetProcAddress
        - api: ntdll.LdrGetProcedureAddress
      - optional:
        - characteristic: indirect call
        - api: kernel32.LoadLibrary
        - api: kernel32.GetModuleHandle
        - api: kernel32.GetModuleHandleEx
        - api: ntdll.LdrLoadDll
signature_matches.name: link function at runtime on Windows
signature_matches.description: linking/runtime-linking

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: link many functions at runtime
    namespace: linking/runtime-linking
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
      - joakim@intezer.com
    scope: function
    att&ck:
      - Execution::Shared Modules [T1129]
    examples:
      - b7b5e1253710d8927cbe07d52d2d2e10:0x401000
  features:
    - or:
      - and:
        - os: windows
        - match: link function at runtime on Windows
        - or:
          - count(api(kernel32.GetProcAddress)): 5 or more
          - count(api(ntdll.LdrGetProcedureAddress)): 5 or more
      - and:
        - os: linux
        - match: link function at runtime on Linux
        - or:
          - count(api(dlsym)): 5 or more
          - count(api(dlvsym)): 5 or more
signature_matches.name: link many functions at runtime
signature_matches.description: linking/runtime-linking
linking/static
signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: linked against CPP standard library
    namespace: linking/static
    authors:
      - "@mr-tz"
    scope: file
    references:
      - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/P._J._Plauger
      - https://www.dinkumware.com/
    examples:
      - 03b236b23b1ec37c663527c1f53af3fe
  features:
    - or:
      - string: "Copyright (c) by P.J. Plauger, licensed by Dinkumware, Ltd. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED."
      - string: "Copyright (c) 1992-2004 by P.J. Plauger, licensed by Dinkumware, Ltd. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED."
signature_matches.name: linked against CPP standard library

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: contain a resource (.rsrc) section
    namespace: executable/pe/section/rsrc
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
    scope: file
    examples:
      - A933A1A402775CFA94B6BEE0963F4B46:0x41fd25
  features:
    - section: .rsrc
signature_matches.name: contain a resource (.rsrc) section
signature_matches.description: executable/pe/section/rsrc
